sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115929" key="yuxotakh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψῡχο-τᾰκής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n115929.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">melting the soul</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">heart,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στόματος πρόθυρα</foreign> (i. e. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χείλη</foreign>) <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.55</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diosc.</author> </bibl>); <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δάκρυα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.198</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maec.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
